meaning: adj.尽头的,极端的,极度的,偏激的,最后的n.极端,极端的事物
examples: His views tend towards the extreme.
The heat in the desert was extreme.
They were reduced to extreme poverty.
Before contemplating such an extreme step Bob should obtain independent financial advice in writing.
Thousands of birds have been seen returning to the islands, despite many succumbing to recent extreme weather.
